# Pull Request

## What & why

<!-- Short description of the change and the problem it solves. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest tests -q` passes locally (Windows or Linux)
- [ ] No real customer data, API keys, or personal paths in the diff
- [ ] Generated-code / safety behavior unchanged, **or** the change keeps
      human review in the loop (see CONTRIBUTING.md — safety rules)
- [ ] New behavior covered by a test (proof test preferred: it fails if the
      fix is reverted)
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing (README / INSTALLATION / GUI hints)
